questions.question_text_full: Which statement is NOT correct according to the passage?

options.text: Since 1950, world population was growing at its slowest speed.
The countries of Asia will contribute more than half of the increase anticipated through 2050.
The population of 61 countries will decrease by 1% or more between 2022 and 2050.
World population is estimated to reach 10.4 billion in 2100.

questions.correct_option_text: The countries of Asia will contribute more than half of the increase anticipated through 2050.
questions.notes: The question asks for the statement that is NOT correct. However, the provided answer key marks option 2 as correct. Based on the passage text, option 2 is factually incorrect (the passage mentions African countries, not Asian countries), which aligns with the question asking for the incorrect statement.
